channel.title: Rulesets on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Rulesets on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Restrict who can dismiss reviews in rulesets
item.description:
GitHub repository rulesets now support restricting who can dismiss pull request reviews. The feature is generally available and lets you control which users can clear review requirements.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Open source license compliance is in public preview
item.description:
GitHub has put open source license compliance into public preview for enterprises. The feature adds centralized, ruleset-based checks to enforce dependency license policy and block noncompliant licenses.

  • Source: GitHub
